recent_60_samples.prompt: Did the resident advisor explain the new rule to you?
recent_60_samples.answer: She asked whether I had a parking sticker.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you hear back from the professor?
recent_60_samples.answer: He asked whether my outline was finished.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you heard from the intramural office?
recent_60_samples.answer: They asked whether our team had enough players.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you returned those library books yet?
recent_60_samples.answer: I have not returned the overdue novels yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I really need a room for our group project.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where do you reserve the study rooms here?

recent_60_samples.prompt: I missed the add-drop deadline this morning.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where do I file a late request?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you settled on a major yet?
recent_60_samples.answer: I have not chosen between economics and statistics.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you catch the early shuttle today?
recent_60_samples.answer: I missed it and walked to class.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the front desk tell you?
recent_60_samples.answer: My replacement key is ready at the office.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Why did you switch dorm buildings?
recent_60_samples.answer: The rooms that face the courtyard stay quieter.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did your lab partner ask you afterward?
recent_60_samples.answer: She asked whether I had submitted the report.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you ask the clerk about reserving a booth?
recent_60_samples.answer: I asked how long groups could stay.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you ask about the registration deadline?
recent_60_samples.answer: I wanted to know when add/drop ends.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you booked your ticket for the city trip?
recent_60_samples.answer: I have not paid the deposit yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I just transferred here this semester.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where do I sign up for intramural soccer?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you finish the reading for class?
recent_60_samples.answer: The chapter was longer than I expected.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the professor tell you after class?
recent_60_samples.answer: She moved the essay deadline to Friday.

recent_60_samples.prompt: You look stressed about your coursework.
recent_60_samples.answer: When are the final papers actually due?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you signed up for next semester?
recent_60_samples.answer: I have not chosen my electives yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the librarian tell you about my book?
recent_60_samples.answer: Your reserved copy is waiting at the desk.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the advisor explain to you?
recent_60_samples.answer: He explained how the waitlist actually works.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you meet with your advisor about the change?
recent_60_samples.answer: She asked whether I had declared a major.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Why did you email the housing office?
recent_60_samples.answer: I wanted to know whether quiet hours changed.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did your advising appointment go all right today?
recent_60_samples.answer: I have not picked my electives yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I really need a place for our group project.
recent_60_samples.answer: You can book a study room online.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you sort out your schedule with your advisor?
recent_60_samples.answer: She suggested that I take fewer credits.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you grab anything good at the dining hall?
recent_60_samples.answer: I missed the late dinner service tonight.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did your roommate ever pay you back for groceries?
recent_60_samples.answer: He has not returned my share yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I just moved into the dorm this weekend.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where do I drop off my recycling?

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the trip leader tell you about gear?
recent_60_samples.answer: He said the climbing helmets are provided.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did your resident advisor tell you?
recent_60_samples.answer: She explained how the laundry cards work.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the lecturer mention about tomorrow's chemistry quiz?
recent_60_samples.answer: The lecturer asked if you'd reviewed the practice problems.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did your friend say about joining the debate club?
recent_60_samples.answer: A friend told me when they're meeting this Thursday.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did the mailroom contact you about your parcel?
recent_60_samples.answer: I have not picked it up yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I heard the hiking club met last night.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where do they post the meeting schedule?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you finish the reading for our seminar?
recent_60_samples.answer: I have not started the second chapter yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you picked a topic for the term paper?
recent_60_samples.answer: I chose the one about renewable energy.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you hear about the midterm being rescheduled?
recent_60_samples.answer: The exam was moved to next Monday.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you find a good spot in the library?
recent_60_samples.answer: I grabbed a desk near the windows.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the librarian tell you about the booths?
recent_60_samples.answer: She said each booth holds six people.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did your dorm advisor tell you about quiet hours?
recent_60_samples.answer: She explained why the quiet hours had been extended on weekdays.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Professor Cho ask you after class?
recent_60_samples.answer: She wanted to know if my draft was ready.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Tell me what your roommate said about quiet hours.
recent_60_samples.answer: She wondered whether residents must observe quiet hours nightly.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you finalized your spring courses yet?
recent_60_samples.answer: I have not confirmed my elective choice.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you get into the seminar you wanted?
recent_60_samples.answer: I added the morning seminar this week.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I just declared biology as my major.
recent_60_samples.answer: Which form do you sign for that?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Why did you visit the registrar's office?
recent_60_samples.answer: My request to switch sections was denied.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I'm worried about overloading next semester.
recent_60_samples.answer: Can you drop a class after midterms?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you fix the leak in your room?
recent_60_samples.answer: The maintenance crew replaced the broken pipe.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Are you settling into the new dorm okay?
recent_60_samples.answer: My roommate keeps the kitchen very clean.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Tell me what the librarian told you about reserves.
recent_60_samples.answer: She mentioned that the textbook sat behind the front counter.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you finish your conversation with the housing office?
recent_60_samples.answer: She wanted to know if my deposit had been returned.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you talked to Professor Reyes about your thesis?
recent_60_samples.answer: She asked whether my outline included three case studies.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Is the heating working in your building yet?
recent_60_samples.answer: The radiator has not been repaired yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I heard the laundry room finally reopened.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where can I find the new dryers?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you talk to your roommate about the noise?
recent_60_samples.answer: He no longer plays music after midnight.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Where did you put the spare key?
recent_60_samples.answer: I left it with the front desk attendant.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Julian tell you about the deadline change?
recent_60_samples.answer: The deadline has been pushed to next Friday afternoon.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you noticed anything strange about the dorm lounge?
recent_60_samples.answer: The vending machine no longer accepts our meal cards.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Where did you hear about the new tutoring service?
recent_60_samples.answer: The flyer that I saw was posted near the cafeteria entrance.
